name: @cheeko-ai/websocket-voice
description: Native bidirectional voice streaming over WebSockets for OpenClaw

scripts.build: tsdown index.ts --no-config --format esm --platform node --target es2023 --out-dir dist --deps.never-bundle openclaw --deps.never-bundle openclaw/plugin-sdk/plugin-entry --deps.never-bundle ws && node -e "require('node:fs').copyFileSync('dist/index.mjs', 'dist/index.js')"
